parameters.query:
INSERT INTO clients (
  client_id, client_name, api_token, api_base_url, is_active, created_at
)
VALUES (
  '{{ $json.client_id }}', '{{ $json.client_name }}', '{{ $json.api_token }}',
  '{{ $json.api_base_url }}',
  CASE WHEN '{{ $json.status }}' = 'active' THEN true ELSE false END,
  NOW()
)
ON CONFLICT (client_id) DO UPDATE SET
  client_name = EXCLUDED.client_name,
  api_token = EXCLUDED.api_token,
  api_base_url = EXCLUDED.api_base_url,
  is_active = EXCLUDED.is_active,
  updated_at = NOW()
RETURNING *;

INSERT INTO client_variables (client_id, variables, updated_at)
VALUES ($1, $2::jsonb, NOW())
ON CONFLICT (client_id) DO UPDATE SET
  variables = $2::jsonb,
  updated_at = NOW()
RETURNING *;

assignments.name: next_steps
assignments.value: 1. Run cache update workflow. 2. Create ChatBot workflow. 3. Test the chatbot.

parameters.query:
SELECT 
  id, session_id,
  message->>'type' as role,
  message->>'content' as message_text
FROM n8n_chat_histories
WHERE session_id = '{{ $json.sessionId }}'
ORDER BY id ASC;
